-    if world is not None:

-        target_yaw = math.atan2(float(delta[1]), float(delta[0]))

-        angle = wrap_angle(target_yaw - robot_yaw)

-        return dist, angle

-

-def aggregate_episode_metrics(per_episode: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> Dict[str, Any]:

+def aggregate_episode_metrics(per_episode):

     n = max(len(per_episode), 1)

-    result = {

-        "primary_metric": "nav_seek_success",

-        "nav_seek_success": float(sum(float(ep.get("nav_seek_success", 0.0)) for ep in per_episode) / n),

-        "social_nav_reward": float(sum(float(ep.get("social_nav_reward", 0.0)) for ep in per_episode) / n),

-        "found_human_rate_over_epi": float(sum(float(ep.get("found_human_rate_over_epi", 0.0)) for ep in per_episode) / n),

-        "safe_follow_steps": float(sum(float(ep.get("safe_follow_steps", 0.0)) for ep in per_episode) / n),

-        "avg_robot_to_human_dis_over_epi": float(sum(float(ep.get("avg_robot_to_human_dis_over_epi", 0.0)) for ep in per_episode) / n),

-        "nav_to_pos_success": float(sum(float(ep.get("nav_to_pos_success", 0.0)) for ep in per_episode) / n),

-        "per_episode": per_episode,

-        "total_episodes": len(per_episode),

-    }

-    return result

+    keys = [

+        "nav_seek_success",

+        "social_nav_reward",

+        "found_human_rate_over_epi",

+        "safe_follow_steps",

+        "avg_robot_to_human_dis_over_epi",

+        "nav_to_pos_success",

+    ]

+    out = {"primary_metric": "nav_seek_success"}

+    for k in keys:

+        out[k] = float(sum(float(ep.get(k, 0.0)) for ep in per_episode) / n)

+    out["per_episode"] = per_episode

+    out["total_episodes"] = len(per_episode)

+    return out
